About Organization

The Patna High Court is the highest court in the Indian state of Bihar.

It was established on 2 September 1916.


About the Programme

The Patna High Court Computer Operator Cum Typist Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens.

The recruitment is for the post of Computer Operator Cum Typist.
